creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Masachika ISHIZUKA from comment #13)

> [nfs server] 
> 13.0-RELEASE-p4 on zfs.
> export /usr/ports

% cat /etc/exports
V4: / -network xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx/xx
% zfs get sharenfs
hoge/usr/ports-current   sharenfs  -network XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX/XX -maproot=foo  local
